title: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?
conditions: Must have at least one Basic Strike or Defend card in deck
notes: The Observe option allows you to enchant a single Basic Strike or Defend card with [purple]Spiral[/purple], a special enchantment fitting the Corruption theme of Underdocks. The Drink option heals you for 33% of your maximum HP and plays out the event's meditative flavor text.
